content:
spending 3 aliemus to heal 15 early game or give casiah 20 aliemus when she's last one alive feels so bad. Can this two get alternative choices similar to dispel/cleanse?

it doesn't have to be this specifically, but
maybe 50 aliemus to one ally as an alternative for 20 aliemus all allies and 30 delay damage as an alternative for revive?
thread_title: Traphase Casiah revive early game and aliemus late game feel so bad to get
